nasb.text: and to make it your ambition to lead a quiet life and attend to your own business and work with your hands, just as we commanded you,

esv.text: and to aspire to live quietly, and to mind your own affairs, and to work with your hands, as we instructed you,

cnv.text: 又要立志過安靜的生活，辦自己的事，親手作工，正如我們從前吩咐過你們，

ccb.text: 你们要立志过安分守己的生活，亲手做工，正如我们以前吩咐你们的。

csbs.text: 你们要立定心志安静下来、做自己的事、亲手做工，正如我们曾经吩咐过你们的，
